name: yeetful-tool-funding
description: Yeetful internal tool (yeetful-tool-* fleet): the universal funding planner as an MCP service with TWO front doors serving identical tools — /mcp free + rate-limited, /paid/mcp x402 pay-per-call with no throttle. Scan a wallet's movable ETH + USDC across Base/Arbitrum/Ethereum and turn any insufficient-funds refusal into an executable cross-chain funding plan (NEAR Intents legs, destination gas included) or a full fund_and_build runbook. Construction-only — never signs, never submits, never touches funds.
